TFT HRl^ddl 4 FT (i), (ii) fF (iii) f PTFT FT Rt-dRlf^d TTTT >»||IH||, 3T«lfq>- "(i) ^t«T f^T, PTFT dffd fF ffRt HHI^+'F, Rf4 fF <-aia 4 a i d a, Rf4 au4 R'd i a, HPft '»TFT, df ffMt - 110001 (ii) ft 3HT. 3ld)+d, *viifiTii< (dl'ld) a>i<Hp.e ai4 4a m4, dPT, ft.ft.3TT. +i>FTF, 1 ftft Ft, dff4r=ft- 110001 (iii) ft iT'T.f. did I, etfFr f44»TT off erar) fF alfta 144stt (tftf sir), ai'4)4 e ai4 4aida, +ld+ldl - 700 020 -dd'-’J - fFlfld 3TfS+lfl -dd'-'l" [TT. f. 2/4/201 S-fbtTf] f ft HP’ ijff, dd+d dfaa 4774 GI/2015 (I) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [Part II—Sec. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th November, 2015 G.S.R. 857(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub- section (1) of section 10 B of the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959 (23 of 1959) and in pursuance of rule 3 of the Cost and Works Accountants (Election Tribunal) Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby amends the notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Corporate Affairs notification number GSR 787(E) dated the 15th October, 2015, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) dated the 15th October, 2015, pertaining to establishment of a Tribunal to decide any dispute arising under Section 10A of the Act in the matter of election to the Council of the Institute of Cost Accountants of India held in June 2015, namely:- 2. In the said notification, for items (i), (ii) and (iii), the following shall be substituted, namely:- “(i) Shri Suresh Chandra. -Presiding Officer Joint Secretary and Legal Advisor, Ministry of Law and Justice, Department Legal Affairs, Shastri Bhawan, New Delhi - 110 001. (ii) Shri R. Asokan, - Member Advisor (Cost), Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Paryavaran Bhawan, CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi - 110 001. (iii) Shri N.K. Bhola, -Member” Regional Director (Eastern Region) and Regional Director (NER), Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Kolkata - 700 020 [F. No. 2/4/2015-PI] K V R Murty, Jt. Secy. *.t Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road. Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
